name: booking / General workflow 49
goal_pattern: Find a 3-star rated hostel with balcony and free cancellation option in Udipi, Karnataka for one person under 50 dollars from June 15 to 20, free wifi is compulsory.

activation.when_to_use: Use for tasks with a similar goal on the same site area.
